stem: A printer prints color posters or black-and-white flyers, one at a time, for a total of 600 minutes each day. It takes the printer 8 minutes to print a color poster or 4 minutes to print a black-and-white flyer. Which equation represents the possible number of color posters, x, and flyers, y, the printer can produce each day?
rationale: Choice A is correct. Time on posters is 8x minutes; time on flyers is 4y minutes. The total is 8x + 4y = 600.
